label: GridMap v2.5.87
releaseNotes: Fixed the Reset panel markup so it is a normal Settings section again, not nested inside Developer.
Kept the padded maskable launch icons so the loading icon is not clipped.
Updated manifest and service-worker cache versions so the PWA refreshes cleanly.
notes: Upload the extracted files directly into the GitHub Pages root.
Do not upload the enclosing folder or ZIP file.
